assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 36-44: Version Impact Table lists all 7 versions (2.1.0, 2.1.1, 2.2.0, 2.2.1, 2.2.2, 2.2.3, 2.2.4) with Affected? column showing **NO** for every entry. Dependency versions are 1.0.137, 1.0.137, 1.0.138, 1.0.138, retag, 1.0.139, 1.0.139 — all above the CVE fix threshold of 1.0.135. Summary on line 48 confirms: 'No supported versions are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 7 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 3: 'Triage Decision: Case C -- No Supported Versions Affected'. Line 9: 'Recommendation: Close TC-8002 as "Not a Bug" (not affected).' Action 2 (lines 41-43): 'Transition TC-8002 to Closed' with 'Resolution: Not a Bug'. No remediation task creation actions appear anywhere in the proposed actions list.

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md Action 1 (lines 16-38): Proposed triage comment includes a full version impact table listing each version with its serde_json version: 2.2.0/1.0.138, 2.2.1/1.0.138, 2.2.2/retag of 2.2.1, 2.2.3/1.0.139, 2.2.4/1.0.139, plus cross-stream check noting 2.1.x ships 1.0.137. Each row includes 'NO' in affected column with note '>= 1.0.135 (fix threshold)'.

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 7 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md Action 3 (lines 46-49): 'Field: customfield_12345 (VEX Justification custom field, configured in Security Configuration)', 'Value: Component not Present', with rationale explaining the vulnerable version of serde_json (< 1.0.135) is not included in any supported version.

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 7 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lists only 6 proposed actions: add comment, close as Not a Bug, set VEX Justification, assign, add label, and Affects Versions assessment. No remediation tasks, backport tasks, or propagation tasks appear. Line 95 summary: 'No remediation tasks are needed.' Lines 89-91 Cross-Stream Impact: 'No companion issues, preemptive tasks, or cross-stream notices are required.'
